text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O was so close to getting<n>first place...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Alas, Trainer... I've come up short.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I could taste the victory, it was so<n>close...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, if I had been but one step faster!<n>You
could've witnessed me<n>glimmering with the sweat
of victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Such is life! The wind, you see, gusts<n>in longing for
my delightful presence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, you look more amazed than I do<n>when
gazing in a mirror.
choice_data_list: I'm just relieved you're your usual self!
I was sure you'd be crushed by the results...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Of all the things to wonder... I<n>remain, as
always, more beautiful<n>than all.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer! Let us return to the<n>academy. My
brilliance must be<n>honed further still!
choice_data_list: Yeah, let's get back on track!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Leave it in my capable hands! What<n>glimmers next
will not be beads of<n>mere sweat—it shall be my
gallant<n>stride!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Light continues to shine from the<n>heavens. Such
radiance at times can<n>force your gaze downward.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Should I avert my eyes, surely it<n>would appear as
if shadows have<n>stricken the land. No... The crowd
must see me in my full glory.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This cannot stand! So I ask you, in<n>what form is it
right that I reveal my<n>own self?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Look upon me, one and all! Watch as<n>I achieve an
ever more radiant light!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
By the way she endeavors to<n>improve—unwilling
to settle with<n>today's performance—I'm certain
that<n>she shines brighter than anyone!
